parameters.description: The start date, inclusive, in yyyy-MM-dd format.
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: The end date, inclusive, in yyyy-MM-dd format.
parameters.name: until

parameters.description: The dimensions, e.g. `query`, `page`. Must repeat for each dimension.
parameters.name: dimensions

parameters.description: The Google access token, must have access to the Google Search Console scope
parameters.name: google_access_token
